allow: Bash(python skills/ui-ux-pro-max/scripts/search.py "web design agency landing page dark minimal conversion" --design-system -p "Mimic Studio")

PowerShell($sw=[Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew\(\); $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://mimicstudio.co" -UseBasicParsing; $sw.Stop\(\); "HTML: $\($sw.ElapsedMilliseconds\)ms, $\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes, Encoding: $\($r.Headers['Content-Encoding']\), Cache: $\($r.Headers['Cache-Control']\)"; $js=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://mimicstudio.co/assets/index-D5pkIPp6.js" -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{"Accept-Encoding"="gzip, br"}; "JS: $\($js.RawContentLength\) bytes raw, Cache: $\($js.Headers['Cache-Control']\)"; $css=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://mimicstudio.co/assets/index-Q76Z0HE1.css" -UseBasicParsing; "CSS: $\($css.RawContentLength\) bytes, Cache: $\($css.Headers['Cache-Control']\)")
